GEO FUNDAMENTALS • D1-1-1

The History and Evolution of GEO

Generative Engine Optimization emerged as a distinct discipline in late 2023, following the widespread adoption of ChatGPT and the launch of AI-powered search experiences such as Perplexity and Bing Chat.

Key Milestones

  • 2022–2023: Rise of ChatGPT and public awareness of LLMs
  • 2023: First research paper on GEO published by Princeton researchers
  • 2024: Major platforms begin surfacing citations in AI answers
  • 2025–2026: GEO becomes a core competency for content teams
